en: "And you, son of man, prophesy to the mountains of Israel, and say, O mountains of Israel, hear the word of the LORD.
zh: “人子啊！你要向以色列的眾山說預言：‘以色列的眾山啊！你們要聽耶和華的話。

en: Thus says the Lord GOD: Because the enemy said of you, 'Aha!' and, 'The ancient heights have become our possession,'
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：因為仇敵攻擊你們說：哈哈！那悠久的山岡都歸給我們為業了。

en: therefore prophesy, and say, Thus says the Lord GOD: Precisely because they made you desolate and crushed you from all sides, so that you became the possession of the rest of the nations, and you became the talk and evil gossip of the people,
zh: 所以你要說預言：主耶和華這樣說：因為敵人使你們荒涼，四圍踐踏你們，好使你們歸給列國中餘剩的人為業，成為人們提說和嘲笑的對象，

en: therefore, O mountains of Israel, hear the word of the Lord GOD: Thus says the Lord GOD to the mountains and the hills, the ravines and the valleys, the desolate wastes and the deserted cities, which have become a prey and derision to the rest of the nations all around,
zh: 因此，以色列的眾山啊！你們要聽主耶和華的話；主耶和華對大山、小岡、溪澗、山谷、荒涼的廢墟，被棄的城，就是曾被四圍列國中餘剩的人所劫掠、所譏笑的，這樣說：

en: therefore thus says the Lord GOD: Surely I have spoken in my hot jealousy against the rest of the nations and against all Edom, who gave my land to themselves as a possession with wholehearted joy and utter contempt, that they might make its pasturelands a prey.
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：我在妒火中說話攻擊列國中餘剩的人和以東眾人，因為他們全心歡喜，滿懷恨惡，把我的地歸給自己為業，好佔有它為掠物。

en: Therefore prophesy concerning the land of Israel, and say to the mountains and hills, to the ravines and valleys, Thus says the Lord GOD: Behold, I have spoken in my jealous wrath, because you have suffered the reproach of the nations.
zh: 因此，你要向以色列地說預言，對大山、小岡、溪澗和山谷說：主耶和華這樣說：看哪！我在嫉妒和烈怒中說話，因為你們擔當了列國的羞辱。

en: Therefore thus says the Lord GOD: I swear that the nations that are all around you shall themselves suffer reproach.
zh: 所以主耶和華這樣說：我舉手起誓說：你們四圍的列國必親自擔當自己的羞辱。

en: "But you, O mountains of Israel, shall shoot forth your branches and yield your fruit to my people Israel, for they will soon come home.
zh: “‘以色列的眾山啊！你們必長出枝條，為我的子民以色列結出果子，因為他們快要回來了。

en: For behold, I am for you, and I will turn to you, and you shall be tilled and sown.
zh: 看哪！我是幫助你們的，我必轉向你們，使人可以在你們上面耕種和撒種。

en: And I will multiply people on you, the whole house of Israel, all of it. The cities shall be inhabited and the waste places rebuilt.
zh: 我要使以色列全家的人數在你們上面增多；城市有人居住，廢墟可以重建。

en: And I will multiply on you man and beast, and they shall multiply and be fruitful. And I will cause you to be inhabited as in your former times, and will do more good to you than ever before. Then you will know that I am the LORD.
zh: 我必使人和牲畜都在你們上面增多；他們必繁衍增多；我必使你們有人居住，像從前一樣，並要使你們比先前更蒙福。你們就知道我是耶和華。

en: I will let people walk on you, even my people Israel. And they shall possess you, and you shall be their inheritance, and you shall no longer bereave them of children.
zh: 我必使人，就是我的子民以色列，在你上面行走；他們必得你為業；你必作他們的產業，也不再使他們喪失子女。

en: Thus says the Lord GOD: Because they say to you, 'You devour people, and you bereave your nation of children,'
zh: 主耶和華這樣說：因為人對你說：你是吞吃人的，又是使你的國民喪失子女的。

en: therefore you shall no longer devour people and no longer bereave your nation of children, declares the Lord GOD.
zh: 所以你必不再吞吃人，也必不再使你的國民喪失子女。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: And I will not let you hear anymore the reproach of the nations, and you shall no longer bear the disgrace of the peoples and no longer cause your nation to stumble, declares the Lord GOD."
zh: 我必使你不再聽見列國的羞辱，你必不再受萬族的辱罵，也不再使你的國民跌倒。這是主耶和華的宣告。’”

en: The word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話又臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, when the house of Israel lived in their own land, they defiled it by their ways and their deeds. Their ways before me were like the uncleanness of a woman in her menstrual impurity.
zh: “人子啊！以色列家住在他們本土的時候，他們的所作所為玷污了那地。他們所行的在我面前，就像在經期中的婦人那樣污穢。

en: So I poured out my wrath upon them for the blood that they had shed in the land, for the idols with which they had defiled it.
zh: 所以我因他們在那地上流人的血，又因他們以自己可憎的像玷污那地，就把我的烈怒倒在他們身上。

en: I scattered them among the nations, and they were dispersed through the countries. In accordance with their ways and their deeds I judged them.
zh: 我使他們分散在列邦，四散在各地；我按著他們的所作所為審判他們。

en: But when they came to the nations, wherever they came, they profaned my holy name, in that people said of them, 'These are the people of the LORD, and yet they had to go out of his land.'
zh: 他們到了所去的列邦那裡，我的聖名就被褻瀆，因為人總是談論他們說：‘這些是耶和華的子民，他們卻要從耶和華的地出來。’

en: But I had concern for my holy name, which the house of Israel had profaned among the nations to which they came.
zh: 我卻顧惜我的聖名，就是以色列家在他們所去的列邦那裡所褻瀆的。

en: "Therefore say to the house of Israel, Thus says the Lord GOD: It is not for your sake, O house of Israel, that I am about to act, but for the sake of my holy name, which you have profaned among the nations to which you came.
zh: “因此，你要對以色列家說：‘主耶和華這樣說：以色列家啊！我作這事，不是為了你們，而是為了我自己的聖名，就是在你們所去的列邦那裡所褻瀆的，

en: And I will vindicate the holiness of my great name, which has been profaned among the nations, and which you have profaned among them. And the nations will know that I am the LORD, declares the Lord GOD, when through you I vindicate my holiness before their eyes.
zh: 我要使我的大名顯為聖，這名在列邦中已經被褻瀆了，是你們在他們中間所褻瀆的。我在你們身上向他們顯為聖的時候，他們就知道我是耶和華。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: I will take you from the nations and gather you from all the countries and bring you into your own land.
zh: 我必從列國中領你們出來，從萬邦中聚集你們，把你們帶回故土。

en: I will sprinkle clean water on you, and you shall be clean from all your uncleannesses, and from all your idols I will cleanse you.
zh: 我必用潔淨的水灑在你們身上，你們就潔淨了；我必潔淨你們的一切污穢，使你們遠離所有可憎的像。

en: And I will give you a new heart, and a new spirit I will put within you. And I will remove the heart of stone from your flesh and give you a heart of flesh.
zh: “‘我必把新心賜給你們，把新靈放在你們裡面；我必從你們的肉體中除去石心，把肉心賜給你們。

en: And I will put my Spirit within you, and cause you to walk in my statutes and be careful to obey my rules.
zh: 我必把我的靈放在你們裡面，使你們遵行我的律例，謹守遵行我的典章。

en: You shall dwell in the land that I gave to your fathers, and you shall be my people, and I will be your God.
zh: 你們要住在我賜給你們列祖的地；你們要作我的子民，我要作你們的 神。

en: And I will deliver you from all your uncleannesses. And I will summon the grain and make it abundant and lay no famine upon you.
zh: 我必拯救你們脫離你們的一切污穢；我必叫五穀豐收，不使你們遇見饑荒。

en: I will make the fruit of the tree and the increase of the field abundant, that you may never again suffer the disgrace of famine among the nations.
zh: 我必使樹木的果子和田地的出產增多，好使你們在列國中不再因饑荒而遭受恥辱。

en: Then you will remember your evil ways, and your deeds that were not good, and you will loathe yourselves for your iniquities and your abominations.
zh: 那時，你們必想起你們的惡行和不好的作為，就必因你們的罪孽和可憎惡的事厭惡自己。

en: It is not for your sake that I will act, declares the Lord GOD; let that be known to you. Be ashamed and confounded for your ways, O house of Israel.
zh: 你們要知道我這樣行，不是為了你們的緣故；以色列家啊！你們要因自己的行為抱愧蒙羞。這是主耶和華的宣告。

en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: On the day that I cleanse you from all your iniquities, I will cause the cities to be inhabited, and the waste places shall be rebuilt.
zh: “‘主耶和華這樣說：我潔淨你們，使你們脫離一切罪孽的日子，我必使城市有人居住，廢墟可以重建。

en: And the land that was desolate shall be tilled, instead of being the desolation that it was in the sight of all who passed by.
zh: 從前所有路過的人都看為荒涼之地，現在卻必再可以耕種。

en: And they will say, 'This land that was desolate has become like the garden of Eden, and the waste and desolate and ruined cities are now fortified and inhabited.'
zh: 他們必說：“先前這荒涼之地，現在竟像伊甸園一樣；這些廢棄、荒涼、毀壞了的城市，現在卻成了堅固城，有人居住了。”

en: Then the nations that are left all around you shall know that I am the LORD; I have rebuilt the ruined places and replanted that which was desolate. I am the LORD; I have spoken, and I will do it.
zh: 那時，在你們四圍所餘剩的列國，就必知道我是耶和華，是我重建了那些毀壞的地方，栽植了那些荒涼之地。我耶和華說了，就必實行。

en: "Thus says the Lord GOD: This also I will let the house of Israel ask me to do for them: to increase their people like a flock.
zh: “‘主耶和華這樣說：我還要讓以色列家求我為他們增加人數，多如羊群。

en: Like the flock for sacrifices, like the flock at Jerusalem during her appointed feasts, so shall the waste cities be filled with flocks of people. Then they will know that I am the LORD."
zh: 守節的時候，在耶路撒冷作祭牲的羊群是怎樣多，那些荒廢了的城市也必照樣滿了人群。他們就知道我是耶和華。’”
